# Making Chinese AI work for the US

**From:** "Azeem Azhar, Exponential View" <exponentialview@substack.com>
**Date:** 2025-02-28T16:37:36.000Z
**Folder:** exponential

---

View this post on the web at https://www.exponentialview.co/p/making-chinese-ai-work-for-the-us

I got together with Jeffrey Ding  to reframe the “US vs China” AI narrative. We speak about AI diffusion, the US ‘containment’ policies and what the US strategy should be.
Thanks all for joining us live – we’ll do one of these every Friday morning-time ET.
